## Type

## Scope / safety

- [ ] No new direct production mutation path
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private documents, generated reports, or customer data committed
- [ ] Proposal -> validation -> review -> snapshot safety model is preserved, or the change explains why it must evolve
- [ ] Runtime/search behavior is read-only unless explicitly documented
- [ ] Migrations, rollout notes, or compatibility notes are included when needed
- [ ] Legacy UI write tools remain locked by default, if UI changed

## Docs / community

- [ ] README/docs/examples updated where needed
- [ ] Issue labels/areas considered (`type:*`, `area:*`, `status:*`, `priority:*`)
- [ ] Discussion is linked when the PR implements an RFC or public beta feedback item
